RULING - DEFENDANT CHRISTIAN WAIS II'S Motion To Compel Further Responses To Srogs And Rpd; And Request For Sanctionsrther Responses is unopposed and granted. order signed in open court. Proceedings not reported; Judge: Scott Borrowman; Clerk: Johnny Sengmany (JPT/302).

Motion To Compel Responses To Discovery
Off Calendar Dec-05-2019 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
Appearances:
Isaac Jacobson, Esq., Jacobson Law PC, 415-715-9928, appearing for Defendant Christian C. Waiss II;
No other appearance.

Judge Pro Tem Adrienne Rogers inquires with defendant's counsel re: additional documents requested by the JPT. Mr. Jacobson provides JPT with the requested documents in open court.

DEFENDANT CHRISTIAN WAIS II'S Motion To Compel Responses To Discovery is taken under submission. Judge Pro Tem: Adrienne Rogers; Clerk: William Trupek; Not reported. (302/JPT)

Notice Of Motion And And Motion To Compel Responses To Discovery And Request For Monetary Sanctions Against Plaintiff Bruce Mitch Ferrin; Memorandum Of Points And Authorities
Off Calendar Nov-01-2019 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
Appearances:
Iassc Jacobson, Esq., Jacobson Law PC, 415-715-9928, appearing for Defendant Christian C. Wais II;
No other appearance.

The Court adopts the tentative ruling as follows:

DEFENDANT CHRISTIAN WAIS II'S Motion To Compel Responses To Discovery And Request For Monetary Sanctions Against Plaintiff Bruce Mitch Ferrin

Motion granted. No opposition was filed. All objections are deemed waived as to plaintiff's responses to this discovery. Plaintiff to serve verified responses to Special Interrogatories Set #1 in compliance with C.C.P. section 2030.210(a)(1) and (2) no later than November 15, 2019. Plaintiff to serve a verified response and produce documents to Request for Production of Documents, Set #1. Response to be in compliance with C.C.P. section 2031.210-230. Defendants requests for sanctions is granted in the amount of $910.00. Plaintiff to serve a check made payable to the Client Trust Fund of Jacobson Law PC. in the amount of pay $910.00 no later than November 15, 2019. Order is signed. Judge Pro Tem: Katherine Gallo; Clerk: William Trupek; Not reported. (302/JPT)
